steps.title: Identify the structural signal
steps.content: The “but” before the underlined sentence marks a contrast with MOMA's claim. The author uses this sentence to establish that video games are inherently interactive, then points out that this feature is “grossly absent” in video presentations. The author is building a factual basis to question MOMA's approach.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: D correctly identifies this function: the sentence is a “consideration that...partly undermines MOMA's approach.” A misreads it as identifying a gap in the exhibition, B wrongly assumes author-MOMA agreement, and C inverts the logic by treating a true claim as a misconception. That matches choice D—D is correct.
